# Test fixtures — third-party (LGPL-2.1)

The packet capture (`*.bin`) files in this directory are copied verbatim from the
[SteamKit](https://github.com/SteamRE/SteamKit) test suite
(`SteamKit2/Tests/Packets`).

They are **not** covered by this project's MIT license. They remain © the
SteamKit contributors under the **GNU LGPL-2.1**, and are used only by `go test`.

See [`THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md`](../../../THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md) at the repo root
for full attribution.
